verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: He is the mighty King, Master of everything, His Name is Wonderful, Jesus my Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Bow Down before Him Love and Adore Him His Name Is Wonderful Jesus My Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He's the great Shepherd, The Rock of all ages, Almighty God is He. Bow down before Him, Love and adore Him, His Name is Wonderful, Jesus my Lord.
